title: payments-api returning 5xx on /v1/charges
description: PagerDuty fired at 14:22 UTC. Error rate on /v1/charges climbed from 0.1% to 6.2% over 3 minutes. Affected region appears to be us-east-1 only. v1.18.5 was deployed at 14:10. Stack traces show a NullPointerException in the retry handler on cache miss.
